title: Risk On And Risk Off
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know about this week
The equity rally signals exuberance, even as gold signals caution. While the world is fixated on debt rising, the latest IIF data suggest that this rise is at least in line with GDP growth. Frequent policy changes and the outcome uncertainty make strategic corporate decisions a lot more difficult.
